channel.title: Blog on Irina's CTF Writeups
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Irina's CTF Writeups

item.title: CyberEdu threadz Writeup
item.description:
Why

I decided to make a post about VMs and things that I didn’t see people talk much about, especially because of my past experiences with them.

Alright, interesting! So we’re blind here. We get 4096 bytes of shellcode to try and figure out the flag.

Identifying the vulnerabilities

My first attempt was to invoke a shell, but I already suspected it wouldn’t work, because of the interesting flag format.
